title: NZ in December with Kids — What to Expect (Weather, Crowds, Costs)
meta_desc: Discover what to expect when travelling in NZ with kids in December, including school holidays, peak season and booking tips
intro: December is the most popular time to travel in New Zealand, with the Christmas school holidays and warm summer weather drawing large crowds. If you're planning a family trip, it's essential to be aware of the peak season reality and plan ahead to avoid disappointment. With some insider knowledge, you can still have a fantastic and stress-free holiday with your kids.

sections.heading: Weather in December
sections.body: December is one of the warmest months in New Zealand, with average high temperatures ranging from 22°C in the north to 18°C in the south. It's an excellent time to enjoy the country's beautiful beaches, such as those found in the Bay of Islands, Nelson, and the Coromandel Peninsula.

sections.heading: Christmas School Holidays
list: The school holidays typically start on mid-December and last for around 6 weeks
Many popular attractions and activities will be busier than usual
Book your accommodation and activities well in advance to avoid sold-out situations
Consider visiting popular spots early in the morning or later in the evening to avoid the crowds

sections.heading: Peak Season Reality
sections.body: December is peak season in New Zealand, and you can expect higher prices for accommodation, activities, and tourist attractions. For example, a family room at the Novotel Auckland Airport can cost around $450 per night, while a campsite at the Top 10 Holiday Resort in Rotorua can cost around $60 per night.

sections.heading: What to Book Early
list: Accommodation, especially in popular areas like Queenstown and Rotorua
Activities, such as ski lessons or popular attractions like the Sky Tower in Auckland
Flights, if you're planning to travel domestically
Car rentals, if you're planning to drive around the country

sections.heading: Budgeting for Your Trip
sections.body: The cost of a family trip to New Zealand in December can add up quickly. To get an estimate of your expenses, you can use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator, which takes into account your accommodation, food, activities, and transportation costs.

sections.heading: Plan Your Trip with Us
sections.body: At NZ Family Travel, we're here to help you plan an unforgettable holiday with your kids. Check out our destinations page for inspiration and ideas on where to go and what to do in New Zealand.
